leadText: The Gold Teeth (Japanese: きんのいれば Gold Dentures) is a Key Item introduced in Generation I.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] Pokémon Red, Blue, Yellow, FireRed, and LeafGreen [ edit | edit source ] The player can return the Gold Teeth to their owner, the Safari Zone Warden , in exchange for HM04 ( Strength ). Pokémon: Let's Go, Pikachu! and Let's Go! Eevee [ edit | edit source ] The player can return the Gold Teeth to their owner, the Safari Zone Warden, to have him teach the Secret Technique Strong Push to their partner Pokémon .

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description Stad Apparently lost and desperately sought by the Safari Zone Warden . FR LG A set of false teeth lost by the Safari Zone 's Warden . It makes his smile sparkle. E Gold dentures lost by the Safari Zone 's Warden . P E Sw Sh BD SP LA S V A set of golden false teeth lost by the Safari Zone's warden. They make his smile sparkle.

sections.title: Trivia
sections.text: Trivia [ edit | edit source ] A similar Key Item , Steel Teeth , exists in Pokémon Colosseum , and can be returned to an old man. Unlike the Gold Teeth, however, returning the Steel Teeth is optional.
